game_info.title: Team Fortress 2 Demake
game_info.concept:
Nine distinct classes provide a broad range of tactical abilities and personalities. Constantly updated with new game modes, maps, equipment and, most importantly, hats! Steam URL: https://store.steampowered.com/app/440/Team_Fortress_2/ ================================================================================ Full Description: ================================================================================ Nine distinct classes provide a broad range of tactical abilities and personalities. Constantly updated with new game modes, maps, equipment and, most importantly, hats!

"The most fun you can have online" - PC Gamer

Is now FREE!

There’s no catch! Play as much as you want, as long as you like!

The most highly-rated free game of all time!

One of the most popular online action games of all time, Team Fortress 2 delivers constant free updates—new game modes, maps, equipment and, most importantly, hats. Nine distinct classes provide a broad range of tactical abilities and personalities, and lend themselves to a variety of player skills.

New to TF? Don’t sweat it!

No matter what your style and experience, we’ve got a character for you. Detailed training and offline practice modes will help you hone your skills before jumping into one of TF2’s many game modes, including Capture the Flag, Control Point, Payload, Arena, King of the Hill and more.

Make a character your own!

There are hundreds of weapons, hats and more to collect, craft, buy and trade. Tweak your favorite class to suit your gameplay style and personal taste. You don’t need to pay to win—virtually all of the items in the Mann Co. Store can also be found in-game.
game_info.description: Team Fortress 2 (Demake) is a class-based first-person shooter where you battle for control of a central point. Choose from three distinct classes: the fast-moving Scout, the explosive Soldier, or the heavy-hitting Heavy. Your objective is to capture the central control point by standing on it while fending off the enemy Blue team. Manage your health and ammo, use cover effectively, and lead the Red team to victory!
game_info.controls:
- W / S: Move Forward / Backward
- A / D: Strafe Left / Right
- Arrow Left / Right: Look Left / Right (Rotate)
- Arrow Up / Down: Look Up / Down
- Space: Jump
- Z: Shoot / Attack
- Shift: Sprint (Scout) / Focus (Soldier/Heavy)
- Enter: Start Game / Select Class
- ESC: Pause / Unpause
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Verify player movement and input responsiveness.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Set control mode to "TEST_1". Simulate pressing 'W' key for 60 frames. Monitor player position change.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player Z position should increase (or decrease depending on orientation) relative to start position, indicating forward movement.
TEST_1.description: Verify player movement and input responsiveness.

TEST_1.expected: Player Z position should increase (or decrease depending on orientation) relative to start position, indicating forward movement.

TEST_2.test_description: Verify weapon firing mechanics and projectile creation.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Set control mode to "TEST_2". Select Soldier class. Simulate pressing 'Z' key. Check projectile array for new entities.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: GameState projectiles array length should increase from 0 to 1 immediately after firing.
TEST_2.description: Verify weapon firing mechanics and projectile creation.
TEST_2.strategy: Set control mode to "TEST_2". Select Soldier class. Simulate pressing 'Z' key. Check projectile array for new entities.
TEST_2.expected: GameState projectiles array length should increase from 0 to 1 immediately after firing.

TEST_3.strategy_description: Teleport player to control point (0,0,0). Wait for 120 frames. Check capture progress variable.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Capture progress should increase above 0. Team ownership logic should trigger if progress fills.

TEST_4.strategy_description: Place player next to a wall. Simulate movement vector into the wall. Update physics.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Player position should not penetrate the wall's bounding box. Velocity should be neutralized in collision normal direction.
